The '''515 blaster''' was a model of blaster produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]. [[Mirta Gev]] pulled a 515 on the [[Paradise (cantina)|Paradise Cantina's]] to get information about [[Jaing Skirata]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}

}}
